title: [CI:DOCS] docs: specify `rmi` removes dangling parents
body:
<!--
Thanks for sending a pull request!

Please make sure you've read our contributing guidelines and how to submit a pull request (https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md#submitting-pull-requests).

In case you're only changing docs, make sure to prefix the pull-request title with "[CI:DOCS]".  That will prevent functional tests from running and save time and energy.
-->

Same documentation change as containers/buildah#3306, resolving containers/buildah#3302.

comments.body:
You have to sign your PRs

git commit -a --amend -s
git push --force

> Please remove the empty new lines that were added.

Oops--those were added by my editor's autoformatting (I didn't realize they were there); I have removed them now.

[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *kwshi*, *rhatdan* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fpodman). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/master/OWNERS)~~ [rhatdan] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
